# PlantHire (planthire.ai)

> Book plant equipment on demand.

Excavators, dumpers, rollers and telehandlers — live availability, operator hire, and delivery to site.

## What this is
PlantHire is a vertical in the CSOAI Hive — EU AI Act / NIS2 / DORA compliant tooling exposed as Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers callable by any AI agent.

## MCP tools
- planthire-ai-mcp.book_equipment: Reserve plant directly from project-management tools or AI agents.

## Discovery
- Agent card: https://planthire.ai/agent.json
- MCP catalog: https://planthire.ai/.well-known/mcp.json
- Sitemap: https://planthire.ai/sitemap.xml
- Hive registry: https://csoai.org (271 published MCP servers)

## Pricing
See https://planthire.ai/pricing/
